# Agent Client Nonresponsibilities

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeresponsibilitydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime responsibility](../runtime-responsibility.md)

Agent profile, presentation, and device listing behavior live outside the provider runtime.

- The runtime consumes assigned run input after the control plane has selected the agent/device/provider.
- The runtime may translate instruction, model, and capability values into provider arguments.
- The runtime does not create agent records, render participants, or own profile thumbnail state.

This prevents client UX fields from becoming implicit process execution policy.
